title: AriaRole
description: A WAI-ARIA role definition that provides semantic meaning to HTML elements for assistive technologies.

category.description: The role category in the ARIA taxonomy

description.description: Description of the role and its semantic meaning

superclassRole.description: Parent roles in the ARIA role hierarchy

requiredStates.description: ARIA states required for this role

supportedProperties.description: ARIA properties supported by this role

implicitAriaSemantics.description: HTML elements that natively carry this role

specUrl.description: URL to the WAI-ARIA spec definition
